title: 2025 Crypto Crime Surged to $158 Billion — What It Means for AML Teams in 2026
excerpt: Illicit crypto flows nearly tripled last year, yet the industry's share of criminal volume actually fell. We break down the key trends, from the Bybit mega-hack to AI-powered scams, and what compliance teams should prioritize now.

title: FATF Travel Rule in 2025: 99 Jurisdictions Adopted It — Only 40 Got It Right
excerpt: Despite broad adoption, enforcement gaps persist. We examine the most common compliance failures VASPs make around originator data, beneficiary screening, and sunrise issues.

title: Cross-Chain Bridge Tracing: Why Hopping Chains No Longer Hides Stolen Funds
excerpt: Modern forensic tools can follow assets across Wormhole, Stargate, and 20+ bridge protocols. Here's how investigators reconstruct cross-chain laundering paths.
